title: Cuneiform Tablet #0275: Early Dynastic Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
